Aeh 😜

No relationship mentioned cause y'all know I like keeping it vague, despite having this in my caption I always have at least one person who doesn't read and asks 😭

Play with chat memory 💋

Damn????

moving on,

Why are people becoming more comfortable with making jokes about child molestation...? Most brain rot humor is just so unfunny to me but I especially don't understand what's so funny about kids getting touched inappropriately 😭

People just love contributing to rape culture, also I'm suprised at how many people don't know what rape culture is???

To give a very quick rundown, rape culture is a society where sexual violence is normalized, ignored, or made to be something trivial. There are many many things that we see in media that contribute to rape culture, I was genuinely suprised to see that so few people seemed to not even know the term 😭??

It's insane how stuff like this and misogyny is so ingrained into society 😟

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
